headline: Apollo Global Management: Formation Of Fee-Generating AUM Remains Strong
summary: Apollo Global Management's AUM reached $1.026 trillion, with fee-generating AUM up 40% year-over-year. Learn why APO stock is a buy.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Iran deal fuels global relief rally
summary: Iran peace deal sparks a global relief rally in stocks amid hopes that the end of the war will ease the energy crisis impacting economies worldwide.

headline: $1 Trillion Fund Manager Picks Texas Over Florida
summary: Apollo Global Management just picked Austin, Texas, as the site of its second headquarters, according to a Seeking Alpha report. The decision ended a months-long competition that included Miami, Palm Beach, and Nashville. What makes Apollo's choice notable is not just where it landed, but what it ...
